type: SURVEY
files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
note: Feature: remove temperature modulation in propose_instruction_for_predictor; add GroundedProposer._cache_salt(pred_i, demo_set_i) method; add cache_salt InputField to DescribeProgram, DescribeModule, and the dynamically-generated GenerateSingleModuleInstruction (in generate_instruction_class); thread cache_salt param through GenerateModuleInstruction.forward() and its three signature calls (describe_program, describe_module, generate_module_instruction), and through propose_instruction_for_predictor -> instruction_generator(...) call.

type: SURVEY
files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
note: Adding tip_weights param to GroundedProposer.__init__ (line ~272-299); adding new helper _select_tip_with_weights(); modifying tip selection block in propose_instructions_for_program (lines ~360-371, the 'if self.set_tip_randomly:' block) to call weighted selection when tip_weights is set, else preserve uniform self.rng.choice().

type: AGREE

Proceeding to implement independently.
